from __future__ import annotations


class VendorError(Exception):
    pass


def _vendor_parse(text: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    raise VendorError(f"vendor failed for: {text}")


def parse_document(text: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    try:
        return _vendor_parse(text)
    except VendorError as exc:
        raise ValueError("document parsing failed") from exc
